title: PVC Pending Due to StorageClass Misconfiguration
description: In this lab you will diagnose a PersistentVolumeClaim that is stuck in Pending state because of a StorageClass misconfiguration. You will trace the failure through PVC events, examine available StorageClass resources, identify the mismatch or missing provisioner, and fix the configuration to allow the volume to be provisioned and bound. This is a critical skill for anyone managing stateful workloads on Kubernetes.
